Homepage | asa hydraulik
Skip to main contentt
Be different.
Make a difference.
We design and manufacture coolers and compact hydraulic solutions for your application.
asa Product Catalogue
Questions?
Products
Our Production
Realizing innovative solutions for hydraulic applications calls for state-of-the-art production facilities. Our spirit of innovation and our passion for technology flow into the way we design and operate our furnaces, and also inform our production processes and influence the way we develop our tools. Our goal is to provide our customers with top quality solutions for hydraulic applications, such as plate and bar and finned tube heat exchangers, connection technology, and fluid control systems.
Thermal Systems
Explore our wide range of heat exchangers for oil/air/water/hydrogen and electronic cooling.
Thermal Systems Oil/Air Coolers
Images
Thermal Systems Oil/Water Coolers
Thermal Systems Offline Coolers
Thermal Systems Oil/Water/Air Coolers
Thermal Systems Eco-Plus Heat Exchangers
Connection Technology
Discover our metal and rubber connection solutions. Reliable vibration control for your industrial and mobile applications.
Connection Technology Suction Line
Connection Technology Valves
Connection Technology Vibration Technology
Fluid Controls
Learn more about our centrifugal water pumps and our gerotor oil pumps, also available as motor/pump units.
Fluid Controls Gerotor Oil Pumps
Fluid Controls Centrifugal Water Pump
Applications
Our solutions
Our customer portfolio features leading original equipment manufacturers who use our products to always be a step ahead when it comes to next-generation manufacturing solutions.
Agricultural and Forestry Industry
Handling and Lifting Equipment
Municipal and Commercial Vehicles
Electric & Electronic Cooling
Mining & Recycling

Renewable Energies

Process and Energy Industry

about.text:
About | asa hydraulik
Skip to main contentt
About asa
Providing the most effective heat exchange, controlling fluids reliably, and connecting the two. This is how asa makes the difference in both mobile and stationary hydraulic applications.
More than 40 years of experience in heat transfer equipment, connection technology and fluid controls has made us global leader in advanced technologies. Learn more about how our spirit of innovation drives us day to day from the past to the future developments, to create a difference in the market.
asa-Company-Presentation
Location
Our Locations
The company name ASA is an abbreviation for the German words “Antriebselemente” (drive train components), “Steuerungselemente” (control components) and “Anlagen” (systems or aggregates). Since the foundation in 1980, our locations expanded and developed to individual competence centers, worldwide. Contact us to find the closest distribution partner or competence center for your enquiry.

Sustainability
What sustainability means to us
Sustainability means to us to bear the highest responsibility, maintained in all its belongings at environment, work safety, employee development and financial integrity. As a responsible long term partner it is mandatory to work to certified standards as well as to global asa standards. The group organization and the actual asa centers are working according the management manual to assure the quality in any scope.
Our Management
Our system is based on international quality, health and safety and environmental standards. Tools like layered process audits and performance monitoring flow into asa’s integrated management approach, thereby improving direct communication and awareness of risks of each individual.
ISO-9001-EN
ISO-9001-DE
US-ISO-9001
Our Best Practice
We work above standards and maintain our medium size structure of a family owned company. Error prevention tools like FMEA, Poka Yoke, Kan Ban, are indispensable for our internal processes. Recording quality and global corporate structure enable the spirit to improve and apply best practice solutions.
ISO-45001
Our Environment
The areas of greatest environmental impact are waste disposal, material and energy use. In recognizing these impacts, asa is taking responsibility to work beyond the governmental standards to make a difference in the current situation as well as for the challenging future.
ISO-14001
1980
—   1995
Foundation in Vienna, Austria
With the focus on special hydraulic components and heat exchangers, asa development the standard philosophy at the earliest point on the market. The combination of short lead times, cost efficiency  and proven quality was established with the first standard cooler series back in 1987.
1995
—   2010
Expansion, innovation and patents, Austria
In the 1990s and early 2000s
, asa was able to win over both new and existing customers with its
patented connector and mounting systems
